DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFF AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $625, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE ULMER. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Moiton To Compel Objection Free Responses From Pltf Louis Griffin And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Daniel Zaheer, Atty. for defendant and moving party: City and County of San Francisco
No other appearances.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $625, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. Judge Ulmer, Matter not reported
